stimulus: In 1882, almost 80% of Florida’s railroads were already owned by Henry Plant’s Plant System. The company further strengthened its ______blank in rail access to the state’s Gulf Coast when it completed the Tampa Bay Railroad in 1885: running from Jacksonville to Tampa, the new line carried most of the region’s freight and passengers.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice C is correct because "control" matches the idea of a company that owned most of the railroads and strengthened its hold over Gulf Coast rail access. Choice A is incorrect because neutrality contradicts ownership of 80%. Choice B is incorrect because insignificance is the opposite. Choice D is incorrect because creativity isn’t the focus.
